descriptionByLocale.en: EOC â€“ Ente Ospedaliero Cantonale, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutions throughout the cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for the effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring a global and proximity hospital offer to the population, regardless of the location where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relationships, EOC ensures high-quality healthcare assistance to 380,000 patients per year. ## Profile The future collaborator/operator has the knowledge and functional and technical skills to do their job and achieve high-quality results; has the ability to learn new techniques and is interested in innovations; knows how to work independently and uses their time efficiently and effectively. They are a person who can ask for feedback and learn from the advice received in order to improve their performance and services. They believe, like us, in the importance of putting the patient and their family at the center of all our attention. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of capacity of socio-sanitary operator - Availability to work on all shifts (including nights) - Good stress management - Attitude to quality service and multidisciplinary collaboration - Balanced character, flexibility, and positive attitude - Essential knowledge of main computer tools (office package) ## Observations - Applications from those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database. - Candidate evaluation will be made only in case of service needs. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no phone information will be released. ## Contact Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Description The EOC, the multisite hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes on the entire cantonal territory for a total of 1,000 beds. The organization allows for an effective combination of local approach and overall vision, ensuring the population a global and proximity hospital offer, regardless of where the services are requested. Thanks to the commitment and competence of over 5,000 collaborators and their attention to human relations, the EOC ensures quality health care to 380,000 patients per year. ## Tasks The following position is addressed to candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) for the Novaggio site. In case of job availability, candidates with profiles that match the required requirements will be contacted for a first interview. ## Requirements - Recognized occupational therapist diploma from CRS - Initiative spirit; outstanding relational and communication skills - Organizational skills and predisposition to interdisciplinary collaboration in a perspective of continuous improvement of department development and achievement of given objectives - Flexibility and positive attitude, pleasure in working in a team and collaborating transversely - Knowledge of other national languages and English - Excellent knowledge of main computer applications ## Profile - Has obtained a recognized occupational therapist diploma from CRS - Preferably boasts experience matured in the areas of: - neurology - pediatric medicine - traumatology - hand surgery - Is an action-oriented person and is able to establish effective and constructive relationships with internal and external customers - Has good listening skills and knows how to carefully evaluate every situation before acting - Believes like us in the importance of putting the patient and his family at the center of all our attention and dedicates himself with commitment to his personal development ## What we offer - ## Contact If you recognize yourself in the profile and values sought, send your application Â» ## Observations - The applications of those who do not possess the above-mentioned requirements will not be considered in any case and will be eliminated from our database - The evaluation of applications will only be made in case of service needs - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be released - EOC - our hospital Interested?

descriptionByLocale.en: Description Catering Assistant - Job Advertisement The EOC, the multi-site hospital of Ticino, is present with its institutes throughout the entire canton with a total of 1,000 beds. The organization effectively combines a local approach with an overall vision, ensuring the population a comprehensive and accessible hospital offering, regardless of where services are required. Thanks to the commitment and expertise of over 6,500 employees and their focus on human relationships, the EOC provides high-quality healthcare, caring for over 41,000 inpatients per year and delivering more than 600,000 outpatient consultations. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application to the EOC Rehabilitation Clinic (CREOC) in Novaggio. If there are employment opportunities, candidates whose profiles match the required qualifications will be contacted for an initial interview. The following position is aimed at candidates who wish to submit a spontaneous application as a Catering Assistant. ## Profile - The future employee feels comfortable in a multicultural environment, manages interpersonal relationships with patients, ensures quality while respecting established times and procedures, and enjoys collaborative and teamwork. ## Requirements - Federal certificate of proficiency as a hotel or catering employee - Proficiency in Italian (spoken and written) and good knowledge of a second national language - Good computer skills - Availability for shift work (including Saturdays, Sundays, and holidays) with flexible hours - Adaptability to change and development - Professional experience in hospital or hotel facilities is considered an asset ## Notes - Applications from candidates who do not meet the above requirements will not be considered and will be deleted from our database. - Applications will only be evaluated if there is a service need. - As this is a position for spontaneous applications, no telephone information will be provided. ## Contact EOC - Our Hospital Interested? If you identify with the profile and values sought, submit your application Â»
